summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification completed with no GitHub mutations. Classified each listed candidate independently using the hydrated cluster preflight artifact; routed the two security-sensitive closed PRs to central security handling and left non-security PRs as non-mutating inventory outcomes.

actions.reason: Useful narrow PR with proof and no shared canonical in this inventory shard; plan mode and blocked merge/fix actions make non-mutating keep_independent the conservative outcome.
Related to hydrated canonical issue #80520, but it is an open PR with active review context and no merge/close action is allowed in this plan shard.
Narrow availability fix with proof and no dedupe canonical in this shard; leave as independent maintainer-review work.
Broad independent feature PR with failing docs check and proof review requirements; non-mutating keep_independent is clearer than closure or merge.
Security-sensitive item is out of ProjectClownfish cleanup scope; route only this item while continuing unrelated non-security classifications.
Related/overlapping with the stronger hydrated #90918 path, but closing or superseding would require maintainer judgment and closure is not appropriate from this plan shard.
Broad but coherent feature PR with its own review path; keep independent rather than close or infer a canonical.
Security-sensitive dependency/package-contract item is out of ProjectClownfish cleanup scope; route only this item while continuing unrelated classifications.
Related candidate fix for hydrated issue #84276 with passing proof, but merge/close is blocked by job mode and maintainer-review requirements.
Related but currently failing broader candidate for #84276; keep related and let maintainers decide whether to repair, supersede, or split.
